steps.title: Solve the quadratic
steps.content: Set each factor of $(3x+8)(4x-3)=0$ to zero: $3x+8=0$ gives $x=-\tfrac{8}{3}$, and $4x-3=0$ gives $x=\tfrac{3}{4}$.

steps.title: Identify the matching solution
steps.content: The solutions are $-\tfrac{8}{3}$ and $\tfrac{3}{4}$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
